headline: Child labour detected in 340 palm oil estates in 2024
context: The Department of Labour detected child labour in 340 palm oil estates during 2024 inspections, involving approximately 1,200 children of migrant workers.

cards.big: Child labour found in 340 palm oil estates involving 1,200 children in 2024
cards.sub: Children of migrant workers perform hazardous tasks on plantations

cards.big: Children and Young Persons Act 1966 prohibits employment under age 15
cards.sub: Enforcement on remote plantations limited by 890 inspectors for 450,000 estates

cards.big: ILO Convention 182 on worst forms of child labour ratified by Malaysia in 2000
cards.sub: Palm oil plantation work classified as hazardous under convention definitions

cards.big: US and EU import restrictions increasingly linked to child labour findings
cards.sub: RM67 billion palm oil export industry faces market access risk from violations

cards.big: 1,200 children working on plantations means exploitation is subsidising exports
MPOB launched sustainable labour certification for estates in January 2025
